programme.title: Memories of the Sword
programme.desc: While in medieval Korea, a young girl sets out to revenge the betrayal and the death of her mother. But therefore she must face one of the most powerful men and warriors of the Goryo Dynasty.

programme.title: Night Of The Assassin
programme.desc: In the final days of the Joseon Dynasty, a renowned assassin faces an inescapable fate when he crosses paths with a former swordsman and village leader. Amidst the chaos, their encounter sets in motion an epic tale of irreversible destiny.

programme.title: The Swordsman
programme.desc: After being blinded in a coup against the king, Joseon’s greatest swordsman goes into hiding, far removed from his city’s anguish. But when traffickers kidnap his daughter, he has no choice but to unsheathe his sword once more.

programme.title: The Man From Nowhere
programme.desc: A quiet pawnshop keeper with a violent past takes on a drug-and-organ trafficking ring in hope of saving the child who is his only friend.

programme.title: The Big Boss
programme.desc: Bruce Lee faces an underground criminal element after members of his family begin disappearing. Now he must break his vow of non-violence to take on the terrifying "Big Boss."

programme.title: Fist of Fury
programme.desc: A Bruce Lee Classic! Lee plays Chen Zhen, a student of Huo Yuanjia, who fights to defend the honor of the Chinese in the face of foreign aggression, and to bring to justice those responsible for his master's death.

programme.title: The Way Of The Dragon
programme.desc: Legendary Bruce Lee's only complete directorial film is packed with action and epic fight scenes. Lee visits his relatives at their restaurant in Italy and has to help them defend against brutal gangsters harassing them.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A human skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. When investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, let alone who killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, the Florida mobile home of Effie and Michael Ratley catches fire. Michael heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is found beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Two men are murdered while sleeping in their beds. The next night, arson destroys a family planning clinic. Investigators wonder whether some shards of glass, paint chips and a chicken feather could link what appear to be two separate crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the suspect was convicted of arson and murder, he maintained his innocence. He turned to law books in the prison library and set out to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When investigators found Bruce Miller dead in the office of his junkyard business, the crime scene was almost pristine. But when a computer forensics expert examined computers owned by the victim's wife and her lover, he found all the evidence needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Several suspects and conflicting evidence complicated a brutal murder investigation. But the forensics were clear on one thing: the killer knew his victim, and that alone gave investigators a head start.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young hairdresser was sexually assaulted and murdered in her own beauty salon. The evidence at the crime scene didn't match any of the suspects and, after the initial investigation, the case went cold for ten years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1980, Michigan resident Shannon Mohr died in what her new husband, David Davis, reported to be a horseback riding accident. After her death, Shannon's family reported that Davis seemed far from grief-stricken.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the number and volume of bloodstains at the scene was greater than usual, it was up to forensic scientists to find out why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, the body of young mother Summer Baldwin was found in a suitcase in a Texas landfill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This killer probably hoped to cover his tracks by staging the crime scene. But investigators saw through the attempt almost immediately and turned to forensic science to learn what really happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why a young scientist has fallen gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than thirty times and the crime scene was awash with her blood. Near her head, police discovered a distinctive button with strands of thread still attached.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of 9-year-old Jessica Knott, police use a garbage bag to connect suspect James Edward Crow, Jr. to the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women went missing and were later found brutally murdered, police wondered if they were victims of a hate crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, nursing student Tamika Huston went missing from her Spartanburg, South Carolina home. A tip led detectives to her car, where they found an unknown house key that could help solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, a 12-year-old was found murdered in her Minnesota home. Despite a meticulous search of the home and an exhaustive investigation, police had no suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two different men called police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called. The investigation uncovered even more unusual circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, the body of a young woman was discovered in an Ohio river. Most of the evidence had been washed away, but the victim's 6-year-old son unwittingly told investigators all they needed to know — without saying a word. The clue was in his genes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a policeman's house goes up in flames, experts suspect arson. The officer whose home was torched arrests low-level drug dealer James Wren, who confesses. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators question the authenticity of the confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this episode, the decade-old murder of a young Texas housewife is investigated.

programme.desc: En octubre de 1995, una familia de Carolina del Sur fue tomada de rehén como parte de un robo de banco bien planificado. La policía local rápidamente identificó a dos de los criminales, pero el autor demostró ser más evasivo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Una joven madre y su hijo desaparecieron misteriosamente de su casa. El esposo de la mujer era el único sospechoso, pero luego quedó descartado.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Los estragos de un asesino en serie fueron descubiertos cuando los cuerpos de varias mujeres jóvenes comenzaron a aparecer en tumbas poco profundas que salpicaron el ambiente silvestre de Alaska.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1994, cuando un vehículo blindado de Wells Fargo desapareció de un centro comercial de Glendale, Arizona, las autoridades locales y el FBI fueron de inmediato a recuperarlo, junto con la carga de casi un millón de dólares.

programme.title: Cops en español

programme.title: Cops en español

programme.title: Cops en español

programme.title: Cops en español

programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The shooting death of a young escort prompts an investigation into high society in New York, while McCoy and Carmichael track down career criminals.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a corrections officer leads detectives to a women's prison where a guard was linked to an inmate Carmichael put away on drug charges.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives feel a woman is withholding information when they probe the murder of her wealthy husband and very young daughter.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Evidence points Detectives Briscoe and Curtis in the direction of a fascist youth gathering after the brutal beating and murder of a high-school girl.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A shooting sends police divers into the Hudson River where they find a VW bus linked to a murder case closed in the 1960s during student uprisings.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Discovery of a parolee's corpse in a car trunk sends detectives after a suspect that bounty hunters also want, dead or alive.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis probe the murder of a popular Harlem community leader; McCoy and Carmichael struggle to prevent a chaotic situation.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Discovery of a corpse in Battery Park reunites squads when the victim turns out to be a Baltimore official. (Concluding on "Homicide: Life on the Street.")

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a girl who managed to die, unnoticed, amid the hustle and bustle of an ER's waiting room.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a possible homicide while probing the assault of a retired divorce attorney.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the murder of a police officer who was shot while on an undercover stakeout.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives link the shooting of an investigative reporter to a sensationalized murder case, closed 20 years earlier.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Family secrets unravel when detectives look for motives for a college professor being thrown into the path of a subway train.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a corporate mogul's death, caused by an overdose of a drug that enhances sexual performance.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When the murder of an audio-system installer links to the mob, McCoy's office must ensure witnesses' safety.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a promising mathematician who was involved in a turbulent relationship with a college professor.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis become entangled in the Russian mafia while investigating two murders with a speechless child as the only witness.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A pregnant Mary wants Adam and his wealthy Bostonian father to mend their relationship through reconciliation.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The children plot to scare Mrs. Oleson into returning an old woman's (Hermione Baddeley) home.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles and Joe Kagan are jurors in the trial of a bigot accused of torching a barn and assaulting Andy.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Adam becomes depressed when Mary announces that she can distinguish between light and dark; the family is thrilled.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Away from home on a buying trip, Charles faces an emotional problem when a lonely woman and her children turn to him for affection.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles and Jonathan set out on a search for medicine when members of their families contract anthrax.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura and Albert leave home to help a terminally ill boy realize his dream of seeing the ocean before he dies.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura tries to convince Almanzo she is mature and her love for him is not just infatuation.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura wants to pass the teaching exam to prove her maturity, but romantic rival Nellie has other ideas.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The Ingalls go to court to adopt Albert, but his father reappears and demands custody.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary must get help when a stagecoach accident traps Adam and endangers a pregnant woman; Laura and Albert offer a beehive to their rivals.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura becomes jealous when Almanzo dates another girl; Mr. Oleson learns that the fat lady in a visiting circus is his sister.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mrs. Oleson demands the Rev. Alden's resignation when she discovers a woman parishioner spent the night in his room.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Albert dreams that he and Laura have been captured by Indians who want him to lead an attack against the U.S. Army.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles and Laura rush to the aid of an old friend when they learn that a disabling accident has destroyed his will to live.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A con artist (Ray Walston) and a wrestler convince Jonathan he could be a champion and urge the town to bet on him.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's Earth Day, a great time for everyone to learn how to help take car of our world, but Ben is wasting paper while BJ isn't too concerned about cutting down a tree to make room for a new playground.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Kami, one of Barney's youngest friends, has trouble keeping up with the other kids and she's tired of always being last. She's not having a very good day.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Tony brings his kite to the park to show his friends, it accidentally blows into the branches of a tree! While waiting for a breeze to blow the kite down, Barney, Baby Bop and the kids play games about "up" and "down."

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are surprised to learn that playing games and having fun in the park is great exercise. Baby Bop is happy to learn that not only is she exercising while she plays, but exercise will make her grow big and strong.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids are excited because five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing buddies are putting on a show in the park tonight! Angela is learning to play the trumpet and knows that it takes a lot of practice. BJ arrives and the group visits the caboose.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Tony shares a box full of numbers that he made with his dad. He is showing them off when a gust of wind blows them all away. Barney and the kids decide to go on a number hunt. They soon find Baby Bop and their hunt takes the group all over the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's always fun to share a day with Barney—but it's also important to learn how to "play it safe!" Baby Bop, wanting to be a good helper, has been attaching adhesive strips to her frustrated (and uninjured) brother, BJ.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Beth has invented a brand-new holiday called "Happy Day," in which everyone gets to make a wish for something which will make them happy—and everyone else tries to make that wish come true! Barney and the kids discuss feelings and facial expressions.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Although the park may be a home away from home for Barney and his friends, BJ wants to build his own "totally awesome, completely cool" house. While BJ works on his house, Barney and the children learn all about houses and homes.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and the kids learn all about “on” and “off” by playing games together.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children bring toys to donate to Mr. Boyd's toy drive. Baby Bop and BJ arrive and after some convincing, Baby Bop learns about the merits of sharing.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Mario is trying to write his very own fairy tale. The children help by acting out some of their favorite fairy tales to give Mario some ideas.

programme.title: Tupac Shakur: Before I Wake
programme.desc: A look back on Tupac's final years through the eyes of Rap legends "Eazy-E", Russell Simmons and Tupac's personal bodyguard, Frank Alexander. Featuring never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: Where We're From: Rise Of L.A. Underground Hip Hop
programme.desc: WHERE WE'RE FROM captures the rise of underground Hip Hop in Los Angeles during the 90s and 2000s.

programme.title: The Temptations
programme.desc: The true story behind the legendary Motown musical sensation is brought to life in this touching miniseries.

programme.title: The Temptations
programme.desc: The true story behind the legendary Motown musical sensation is brought to life in this touching miniseries.

programme.title: Tupac Vs.
programme.desc: Tupac Shakur remains a controversial and misunderstood figure long after the shooting that ended his life. Featuring an in-depth, never before seen 1995 interview, rare footage and stills, interviews from manager Leila Steinberg and more.

programme.title: Jay-Z: Ultimate Hustle
programme.desc: It was hardly predictable when the boy from the Brooklyn projects became the world's first billionaire hip-hop star, Jay-Z. He turned his pain into passion and used the suffering to influence the words and lyrics in his music.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: Symba, a rapper from The Bay Area, tells his life story and how he ultimately landed a deal with Atlantic Records and his first national tour.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: This episode focuses on Big Boss Vette, a rapper from St. Louis. It depicts Vette's life of trials and tribulations, hitting rock bottom and bouncing back to sky high success.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: The third episode tells the story of known battle rapper, Hitman Holla. Growing up in the dangerous city of St. Louis, rising to fame on the television show Wild 'n Out, and taking his music career beyond battle rapping.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: This episode of Future Superstar focuses on punk rock rapper Klondike Blonde. Raised by a single father, Klondike discovered her love for music at a young age. After moving to Atlanta, she shortly rose to fame. This is her story.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: JD is a triple-threat entertainer who rose to fame in commercials and then skyrocketed when he became the voice of Young Simba in the Lion King remake. Raw talent and a genuine passion for his craft make JD a force to be reckoned with.

programme.title: Wu-Tang Clan: Of Mics & Men
programme.desc: The RZA, The GZA, 'Ol Dirty Bastard, Inspectah Deck, Raekwon The Chef, U-God, Ghostface Killah, Cappadonna, Masta Killa and Method Man cut a song - "Protect Ya Neck" - and the world hasn't been the same since.

programme.title: Wu-Tang Clan: Of Mics & Men
programme.desc: Wu-Tang Clan's underground rap single starts to blow up and business moved fast. Despite their success, things were still going on back home in the projects that affected their friends and family — the Wu weren't immune to it. Nor were they bulletproof.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Wigs fly as the queens return to discuss the drama of the season.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: Eight All Stars return to compete to win $200,000 for their favorite charity, and a spot in the Drag Race Hall of Fame. They serve up an epic performance of the anthem "Drag Queens Save the World." Stream new episodes every Friday, only on Paramount+.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars Untucked
programme.desc: The Queens are excited to raise money for their charities and showcase their talents on the mainstage! They speculate about who'll win the first Benefactress Badges of the season, and who'll get cut off. Guest Judge Keke Palmer pops in for a kiki!

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The Queens present a total of 24 iconic looks on the runway - including hand-painted masterpieces created in the Werk Room - in the art-inspired Paint Ball. Oscar-nominated actor Stephanie Hsu joins the judges' panel to appraise the Queens' work.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars Untucked
programme.desc: As the All Stars gag over each other's Paint Ball looks, they reflect on their walk-throughs with RuPaul. The Queens keep the arty party going with a raucous game of "Win, Lose or Bra." Guest Judge Stephanie Hsu visits.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: Romance is in the air as the Queens impersonate celebrities in the Snatch Game of Love. But when two All Stars want to play the same celeb, things get spicy! Meanwhile, a twist means that more badges are up for grabs! Pop superstar Anitta stops by.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars Untucked
programme.desc: After The Snatch Game of Love, the Queens are gooped thinking about how this week's twist could impact the game - and their sisterhood. Guest Judge Anitta shows up to turn the party.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: This week begins with fiery accusations, and when the Queens are tasked with transforming four sexy firefighters into hot pop stars, things really start to sizzle! Country music duo the Brothers Osborne join the judges panel and feel the heat.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars Untucked
programme.desc: After the makeovers, the Queens kiki with their hunky firemen. Guest Judges John & T.J. Osbourne visit, and T.J. discuss the struggle of being gay in country music. And as a bonus, Firefighter Bradley shares his own extra-special party skills.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: This week our All Stars' put their sales skills to the test, as they create raucous real estate commercials for some preposterous properties. Superstar Realtor Tracy Tutor and Comedian Alec Mapa stop by to assess what's on the market.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars Untucked
programme.desc: As the All Stars struggle with the stress of the competition, Guest Judge Alec Mapa drops by to boost their spirits. Later, the Queens kiki and serve up impressions of past Ru girls and each other - until one cuts too close to home.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: While the Ruby Snippers cause icy vibes in the workroom, it's hotter than an oven on the main stage, as the Queens Roast each other to a crisp. Television icon Ruta Lee joins the panel to witness the hilarious jabs.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars Untucked
programme.desc: After a surprise visit with Bob the Drag Queen, the All Stars get serious and discuss how they plan to use their platforms politically. Then, when Guest Judge Ruta Lee joins the queens, things get genuinely emotional and heartfelt.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: This week, the All-Stars get slap happy as they co-star with RuPaul in an acting challenge inspired by some of cinema's most classic catfights. Foxy actor Colton Haynes joins the judging panel to take in all the drama!

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Dime goes on a date with Scrappy but she's in for a surprise. Tommie discovers a hotel receipt in Scrapp's car with Karlie's name on it. Joseline turns to Mimi for help, and Mimi learns that Stevie is hiding secrets. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Deb's panel discussion on bullying has a surprising outcome. D. Smith helps Ariane find her voice. Scrapp has an emotional goodbye with his son, King, and spends his final night of freedom with his family. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Scrapp faces his sentencing as those that love him reflect on their future. Mimi and Stevie take a road trip to uncover the truth. Joseline makes a big confession. And D. Smith and Scrappy face-off after his insensitive social media post.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Tammy faces the truth when Waka's indiscretions hit the blogs. While Joseline defends the legitimacy of her marriage, Stevie decides to work with one of her rivals. J-Nicks and Tiarra decide to take their relationship to the next level. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Stevie and Joseline come face-to-face since separating. Karlie comes clean with Tiarra about Scrapp, and Lyfe surprises Karlie with a ring. Momma Dee suspects Ernest is up to no good. D. Smith shares her music with CeeLo. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Karlie and Lyfe breakup. Karlie confesses to Tiarra. Dime comes face-to-face with Joseline. K Michelle takes Ariane under her wing. When Joc confesses his sins, J-Nicks surprises Amber. Scrappy tries to win back Bambi. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: KK extends an olive branch to Tiarra. Mimi handles unfinished business with Chris. Scrappy turns to Tammy for advice to win back Bambi. Karlie confronts Lyfe about another secret. And Joseline confronts Tommie about an incident. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Stevie and Joseline's relationship ends. Scrappy pops the question. Momma Dee apologizes to Shirleen. KK and Tiarra plan a special surprise for King. The real Tommie is revealed. Joseline attends Ariane's listening party. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Violence concerns cause producers to reunite the cast in small groups. Bambi and Betty Idol face off over Scrappy, Tommie's legal issues worsen due to Joseline, and a shocking turn of events may tie Stevie and Joseline together forever. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Tommie lets everyone know the real reason why Scrapp hooked up with Karlie. KK's shocking allegations may affect Scrapp's relationship with his son forever. Plus, how will Stevie handle the rumors that Joseline is expecting his baby? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Joseline and Stevie struggle over the paternity of her unborn child. Tommie faces legal problems. Karlie and Joc rekindle their old flame. Kirk and Rasheeda's marriage is placed in serious jeopardy. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: The Frosts, Kirk's alleged baby mama Jasmine, and her boyfriend Rod deal with the consequences of Jasmine's bomb drop. Joseline and Stevie meet for the first time in months. Momma Dee and Ernest deal with marital issues. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Rasheeda deals with Kirk's infidelity. Rod and Jasmine's unconventional relationship is revealed. Waka tries to make things right with Tammy. Tommie clashes with Karlie. Joseline attempts to resolve her paternity issues. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Tommie is mixing it up with new friends and, potentially, a new man. The end may be near for Scrappy and Bambi. Karlie finds out some shocking details about Jasmine, which prompts Joc to reveal a big secret. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Kui Buri: Thailand's Hidden Eden
programme.desc: Explore Kui Buri National Park, a Southeast Asian haven where elephants, gaurs and vibrant wildlife thrive thanks to ingenious conservation efforts.

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: Experience the wonders of animal life in the Galápagos, where volcanoes, ocean currents and isolation shape existence; dive into mangrove forests, meet bold boobies and flightless cormorants; see Darwin's theory of evolution in action.

programme.title: Hot Life in Africa
programme.desc: The prey forages for food during the hottest time of the day. However, this means that these hunters need to endure scorching temperatures to capture their meal.

programme.title: Deep Dive Australia
programme.desc: Exploring the shores of the Northern Territory and the abundant waters of the Great Barrier Reef; Lizzie faces flooded roads, hungry saltwater crocs, and killer jellyfish as she investigates why many deadly creatures make remote areas their home.

programme.title: Deep Dive Australia
programme.desc: Saying goodbye to the tropics and dipping into the cool southern-coast waters; witnessing grey nurse sharks, shape-shifting cuttlefish and blue whales; playing with penguins and sea lions.

programme.title: Deep Dive Australia
programme.desc: Completing the trip's final lap in the untamed lands where Australia's interior desert meets the Indian Ocean; confronting the challenges of survival in the region; Lizzie dives with tiger sharks, manta rays and nomadic turtles.

programme.title: Reef Wrecks
programme.desc: An island off the coast of Honduras stands out as a holiday resort hot spot, and more than just sun and sand brings the tourists in droves; divers consider the island a paradise of shipwrecks scattered from all corners of the island to explore.

programme.title: Reef Wrecks
programme.desc: Mexico's Yucatán Peninsula houses ships converted to artificial reefs.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Tide
programme.desc: Diving into the alien world that emerges whenever the tide goes out; encounter curious creatures that have evolved to endure this zone's extreme conditions, including an air-breathing fish and a predator that turns itself inside out to eat.

programme.title: Hotspots
programme.desc: Climbing up into the cloud forest and peeking inside a waypoint for migrating birds.

programme.title: New Kids in the Wild
programme.desc: In South Africa's Greater Kruger Park, a lion cub finds her place in the wild under the guidance of a devoted father, a fierce mother and a playful sister.

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: Boning up on desert eats; flirting with lions; witnessing an elephant babysitters' club.

programme.title: Crocs of Katuma
programme.desc: The story of two mothers, a crocodile and a hippopotamus, as they face the perils of raising a family in this beautiful, remote location of Katuma.

programme.title: Cheetah: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Follow two families of cheetahs struggle against heat, starvation and predators on the Serengeti.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett brings someone who has great talent with yo-yos. Mister Rogers shows a film of how people make wooden yo-yos. Prince Tuesday plays well with the yo-yo, but King Friday does not. Therefore, the king outlaws yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely ride with Maria Mancano on a helicopter. Miss Paulificate and Lady Aberlin have been assigned the duty of “yo-yo guard,” responsible for upholding the King's ban on yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely shows a photo album with pictures of Neighbors wearing different hats. Lady Aberlin informs King Friday that Lady Elaine's helicopter, Yo-Yo, is stuck in the air. King Friday commands that all references to yo-yos be removed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of inventor Chuck Hoberman with his sphere and a video of Yo-Yo and Nicholas Ma. The neighbors are waiting for Bob Dog's helicopter to land. They discover that the helicopter responds to guitar music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Maya Lin at her studio to see how she first makes small models of big things she is working on. They go to Penn Station to see what she created there. In Make-Believe, there's a video visit with cellist Yo-Yo Ma.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees a performance by the Westminster Bell Choir and shows how people make bells. Mayor Maggie has a bell that she plays with King Friday and gives to Henrietta as a doorbell. Daniel and H.J. Elephant dress up as astronauts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Visiting a nearby dance studio, Mister Rogers watches a class of young students learning to use ribbons as part of their dance routine. Henrietta is still ringing her new bell and X the Owl is growing quite frustrated.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Percussionist Tim Adams performs. H.J. Elephant is dressed in his outerspace costume as he tells Lady Aberlin about pretending to fly to the moon. He makes a loud trumpet sound which causes alarm for X and Henrietta.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of himself and Sylvia Earle snorkeling in the ocean. Lady Elaine says she is hiding from something they are afraid of from outer space. Mister Rogers suggests when something is scary on TV, turn it off.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Neighbor Aber places a costume on top of Trolley to participate in the upcoming parade. Prince Tuesday is collecting comforting messages for X the Owl and Henrietta Pussycat in hopes of drawing them out for the parade.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers puts together a small fountain and shows a video of fountains around the world. King Friday gives a fountain to Westwood. Mayor Maggie searches for water for the fountain and is squirted by Lady Elaine Fairchilde.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Neighbor Aber wears a raincoat as Lady Elaine continues squirting water from her hose. He helps Corney install an umbrella over the factory. Mr. McFeely stops by with a videotape about how people make concrete sidewalks.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a television studio where the series Arthur is being animated. Mr. McFeely brings a video about how people make traffic signals. Arthur meets the puppets in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: Monster High

programme.desc: Nasty Vicky has magic on her side and revenge on her mind; Timmy wishes for a reset button for his life so he can get do-overs.

programme.desc: Timmy realizes he is not the only one with fairy godparents; Timmy opens a lemonade stand.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¿Qué viene luego del Fin? Dora y Botas están terminando un cuento de hadas y llegan a su fin. Se preguntan qué pasa después y usan su imaginación para continuar la historia.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Oh, no! Tres de nuestros amigos están en problemas. El bebé Jaguar está atrapado en un árbol, Isa cayó en un pozo de arena y Benny está atrapado en el Géiser Pegajoso. ¿A quién rescatamos primero?

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Dora y Botas están haciendo una pijamada! Es la hora de irse a dormir y Dora tiene su osito de peluche, pero Botas no puede encontrar a su dinosaurio. ¡Oh, no! Su dinosaurio debe haberse caído de su mochila cuando estaban en el parque.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Es la hora de una fiesta! A Dora y Botas los invitaron a la Gran Fiesta del Pollo Rojo. Habrá comida tonta, juegos tontos, y hasta bailes tontos. Pero, ¡el Gran Pollo Rojo ha perdido su pastel!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Oh oh! Botas tiene un hoyo en su bota, pero Dora sabe lo que debe hacer. ¡Vamos a la máquina arreglatodo!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: A Botas le encanta el béisbol. Le encanta correr, lanzar y atrapar la pelota. Pero hasta ahora, nunca pudo batear. Dora y Botas tendrán un juego de béisbol y Botas está determinado a batear por primera vez en su vida.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Hoy es el día de los mejores amigos! En este día especial, Dora y Botas se van de picnic para celebrar. Botas lleva chocolate y Dora, deliciosas fresas. Pero, depende de nosotros ayudarlos a encontrarse en la Piedra Arco Iris.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: A' es de Armadillo. Pero, ¿a dónde está el resto de los animales del libro del alfabeto? ¡Se han perdido! Dora y Botas se meten en el gigante libro para ayudar al armadillo a resolver el misterio.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¿Qué quiéres ser cuando seas grande? Dora y Botas prueban toda clase de trabajos, desde bomberos, hasta doctores y arqueólogos. Pero, ¿qué decidirá ser Dora cuando crezca?

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora, Botas y sus amigos preparan una obra de piratas para sus familias. Cuando está por comenzar, los Cerditos Piratas se roban los disfraces.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora, Botas y sus amigos se embarcan en esta aventura musical para recuperar el cofre que los Cerditos Piratas les robaron. Tendrán que llegar a la Isla del Tesoro y regresar a tiempo para la obra. ¿Lo lograrán?

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora y Botas salen en búsqueda de su primera aventura para atrapar estrellas. El viaje los llevará hasta el Castillo de la Nube, en donde intentarán rescatar a una adorable estrella bebé.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora cuenta la historia de cuando conoció a Botas. En su primera exploración, Dora y Botas deben devolver los instrumentos a la banda Fiesta Trio para que puedan tocarle música a la malhumorada Abeja Reina.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Zorro le saca el collar favorito a Dora y lo lanza a la Montaña Estrella. Dora y Botas deberán subir la Escalera Estrella, escalar el Diamante y superar el hielo, el viento y la nieve para recuperarlo.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Zorro inventó una máquina que puede llevarse cosas súper rápido y va a llevarse todos los regalos del cumpleaños de Tico. ¡Súper Espías Dora y Botas, al rescate!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Hoy es un gran día para ir a la escuela! La maestra de música de Botas, necesita ir a la escuela rápidamente, pero ¡su bicicleta está rota!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Es la fiesta de 15 años de la prima de Dora, Daisy. Pero la fiesta no puede empezar sin Dora y Botas. Ellos les enseñarán a bailar el mambo a todos.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: El primo de Dora, Diego, protege a todos los animales de la selva. Pero al tratar de salvar a un pajarito bebé, Diego termina atrapado y ahora necesita nuestra ayuda. ¡No te preocupes, Diego!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora y Botas se disponen a ayudar al Rey Juan el Bobo a que encuentre su corona para que todos puedan ir al cumpleaños de su Mami. ¿A dónde habrá dejado su corona este rey olvidadizo?

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Abuela le da a Dora y Botas un regalo para el nuevo perrito de Dora. Pero, en su camino a casa, deberán tener cuidado con Zorro.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora

programme.title: Dora la exploradora

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Bartolomeo, and Desire make their way up the mineshaft, but Bill's assassin, Peseta, has other plans! Just when the going gets tough, help arrives, and Zoro battles the assassin head on!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Desire, and Bartolomeo go up against Bill! But the mad, Smelt-Smelt man becomes deranged and lets his true power unfurl! Do Luffy and the others have any hope of exposing Bill's self-serving aims and turning his gang against him?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bartolomeo recounts the formation of the Straw Hats, sharing their moving story with the rest of his crew! Meanwhile, the mysterious island of Zou approaches in the distance, obscured by fog. But when the haze clears, no one is expecting what they see!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others arrive at the mysterious land of Zou, and find the Sunny. But when they board, they find the other Straw Hats have already disembarked. Thus, Luffy, Zoro, Robin and the others take on the challenge of climbing the monstrous elephant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Finally scaling the elephant's back, the Straw Hats continue their search for the other half of their crew! But the mysterious "island" on the back of the elephant may hold more danger than they bargained for, as they learn they are not alone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy pushes deeper into the mysterious forest on the elephant's back, but he's treading in territory where is not welcome! Meanwhile, Usopp and the others make a startling discovery in a ruined city!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others survive the Rain-Ruption and learn of its vital role in maintaining life on Zou.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others are unexpectedly welcomed at the fortress and treated well by the Minks, although they have to navigate some cultural differences… And Nami starts sharing what happened to them after they left Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others learn about the dangerous intruders who have come to Zou, and why the island is wrecked! Afterwards, Luffy's loose lips get them into trouble!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Duke Dogstorm - the Straw Hats finally meet the ruler of this strange land, and learn more about the battle that took place here; and the mysterious system by which the island is ruled!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Day turns to night as the Minks keep up their onslaught against the invading Beast Pirates! But Jack's amazing Devil Fruit power may end the elephant island once and for all!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Night and day, Jack faces the fury of the two sworn defenders of Zou, but while they put up a good fight, the Minks aren't able to subdue Jack, especially after he brings out his secret weapon.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: More of the dramatic happenings on Zou are revealed as we learn that Jack's pirate band were not the only visitors to the elephant island! And what about the mysterious fate of Sanji?

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji's dire situation has become clear, but instead of rallying against Big Mom's crew, he submits to go along with them to bring an end to this situation. But being separated from one of his crew is more than Luffy is willing to tolerate!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: There's only one key to finding out what happened to Sanji - and Luffy and the others make their way towards finding out more about their friend's disappearance, but on their way the indigenous fauna give them trouble!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The samurai have landed! And they make their way into the country of Zou unaware of the welcome they will receive by the Minks!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dogstorm and Cat Viper share their story of being on the journey with Oden and Roger but are interrupted by Nami who is concerned about the sea route. Meanwhile, Jack is plotting to bring down the Mokomo Dukedom again!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡Ash enfrenta a su más duro oponente hasta ahora en el Campo de Planta en la Liga Pokémon! ¿Están él y su Bulbasaur listos para enfrentar a su oponente y a su poderoso Scyther?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash conoce a un Entrenador parecido llamado Richie en la Liga Pokémon, los dos chicos pronto se vuelven amigos cercanos, ¡al igual que sus dos Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡En la quinta ronda de la Liga Pokémon, Ash y Richie se enfrentan uno al otro! ¿Sobrevivirá su amistad esta importante batalla?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash, Misty y Brock están en las gradas vitoreando a Richie cuando la Liga Pokémon llega a su fin y marchan juntos en las ceremonias de clausura. ¡Es una experiencia que acompañará a Ash durante todo su viaje como Entrenador!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos regresan a Pueblo Paleta con una gran bienvenida, ¡sólo para ser enviados a otro viaje de inmediato! El Profesor Oak busca una misteriosa Pokébola, y le pide a Ash, Brock y Misty que la encuentren para él.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Los chicos deben viajar a la Isla Valencia para traer una misteriosa Pokébola para el Profesor Oak. Cuando Ash gana un viaje gratis en dirigible, parece que sus penurias terminaron, pero, ¿quién pilotea esta cosa?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras un aterrizaje forzoso en la Isla Valencia, los chicos van al laboratorio de la Profesora Ivy, donde está la misteriosa Pokébola. Brock se asombra al descubrir que la profesora y sus colegas también son criadores Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Gracias a la canción de Jigglypuff, el dirigible de Ash y Misty da vuelta a casa, se sale de curso y se estrella en una isla, donde conocen a un nuevo amigo llamado Tracey mientras intenta ayudar a un Lapras perdido.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash, Misty y Tracey salen a explorar las Islas Naranja, ¡y Ash está decidido a calificar en la Liga Naranja! Pronto descubre que los desafíos del Equipo Naranja son un poco diferentes a las batallas de otros gimnasios.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash, Misty y Tracey llegan a la Isla Mandarina, Pikachu y Togepi se rebelan y se unen a unos Pokémon furiosos. Cuando los Pokémon desaparecen, la Oficial Jenny les habla de la desaparición de docenas de Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash encuentra un mensaje en una botella, el cual lleva a nuestros héroes a una nueva aventura en la Isla Sunburst, y a la búsqueda de un Onix muy especial.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes se encuentran en la Isla Pinkan, hogar de un gran número de Pokémon de colores extraños. Ash y Tracey quedan fascinados con estos Pokémon rosas… ¡al igual que el Equipo Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras unirse a una expedición científica para investigar el fósil de un Kabuto, Ash y sus amigos pronto se encuentran enfrentando una serie de desastres naturales.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Otro especialista en los Pokémon tipo Agua reta a Misty a una batalla y le ofrece un consejo: ¡él cree que el Psyduck de Misty está listo para evolucionar!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes conocen a una muy ocupada Enfermera Joy quien debe saltar por toda la isla para cuidar de todos los Pokémon del área. ¿Podrán ayudar a protegerla del Equipo Rocket?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: En el segundo reto de Ash contra el Equipo Naranja, él debe escalar una montaña, construir un trineo y ganar una carrera de trineos. ¿Sus Pokémon tienen lo necesario para superar estos obstáculos?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: La exploración de nuestros héroes los lleva a las Islas Toronja, ¡donde se enteran de que la famosa fruta de la isla ha estado desapareciendo! Ash, Misty y Tracey salen a atrapar a quien sea responsable.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡Cuando los buzos recuperan un antiguo trofeo de Campeonato de la Liga Naranja, nuestros héroes van directo al museo de arte donde se exhibe para verlo! Desafortunadamente, el Equipo Rocket ya se les adelantó…

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: El Equipo Rocket se estrella en una isla y Meowth es el centro de atención pues lo confunden con el "Gran Meowth Pródigo", una poderosa criatura de la cual habla una profecía. ¿Qué sucederá cuando descubran la verdad?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Misty no está contenta cuando nuestros héroes aterrizan en una isla llena de Pokémon tipo Insecto, aunque Ash y Tracey la pasan muy bien. Cuando encuentran a un Scyther herido, ¿podrá Misty superar su disgusto y ayudarlo?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash y sus amigos encuentran una maravillosa isla repleta de muchos tipos de árboles frutales, deciden tomarse un descanso y disfrutar su botín. Claro que el Equipo Rocket tiene otra idea…

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes conocen a un par de Entrenadores que no parecen llevarse nada bien, aunque sus Nidoran están obviamente encantados uno con el otro. ¡Misty está decidida a resolver este desafío romántico!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Tras caminar bajo una tormenta eléctrica, nuestros héroes encuentran a un grupo de Magnemite absorbiendo electricidad de los rayos. Cuando llegan al pueblo para descansar, hay un apagón. ¿Podrán ayudarlos los Magnemite?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos van en busca de un Pokémon de gran tamaño, pero cuando caen ante un truco del Equipo Rocket, y luego Pikachu y Meowth son secuestrados por un Pidgeot gigante, ¡todos deben trabajar juntos para recuperarlos!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: RiffTrax: Fun in Balloon Land

programme.desc: When the SG-1 team inadvertently helps a desperate criminal, they are charged as accessories to murder and banished to a penal colony. Only one woman there has the power to help them escape....but freedom might not be worth the price she is asking!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Exploring a strange and beautiful garden in a distant world, the team members are trapped, knocked unconscious, and forced to relive their most haunting memories. Now, before they can find their way back home, they must find the way back to reality.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Charles "Lucky" Luciano is found guilty of running a prostitution ring and goes to prison. Vito Genovese becomes acting boss, but not for long...

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: World War II begins, and the military asks Charles "Lucky" Luciano to aid in the war effort. Thomas Dewey considers letting him go.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Charles "Lucky" Luciano takes over Vito Genovese's heroin ring in Italy while Genovese and Carlo Gambino plot against the mob leadership.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Vito Genovese and Carlo Gambino finally make their move. When Genovese becomes a liability, Luciano must choose an heir to lead the mob.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Capone gets a taste of the underworld in Brooklyn with Johnny Torrio. Reuniting in Chicago, they start bootlegging and anger local Irish gangsters.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: A new mayor forces Torrio and Capone outside Chicago to nearby Cicero. There, Capone's brother Frank fixes an election, placing himself in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: A betrayal destroys peace in Chicago, and Torrio and Capone seek revenge against the Irish gangs. The "Beer Wars" make Capone Chicago's top gangster.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Capone uses the St. Valentine's Day Massacre to assert his power over his enemies. President Hoover takes notice, and Eliot Ness takes on Capone.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Al Capone outwits Eliot Ness, but Capone's criminal empire remains in jeopardy when the IRS plants an undercover agent in his gang.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: With Capone in jail, Frank Nitti, Paul Ricca, and Joe Accardo take over. A Hollywood scandal presents Sam Giancana with a chance to prove himself.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Joe Accardo sets his sights on Las Vegas, but when Sam Giancana incurs the wrath of young attorney Robert F. Kennedy, The Outfit is threatened.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Joe Accardo and Sam Giancana have a falling out, and the fate of the Outfit rests on the outcome. Joe Accardo cleans up loose ends before retiring.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Visit the creative team behind Breaking Bad. Join Emmy-winner Bryan Cranston, Vince Gilligan and the entire writing team as they divulge how they created the stories for a show that was recently named one of the best written TV series of all time.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Pay a visit to the team behind Parks & Recreation, the show that skewers small-town politics and features one of America's most energetic, comic talents. Amy Poehler and the writers delve into what it's like to be funny for a living.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes of Dexter, the show about a serial killer with a strict moral code. Now in its 8th and final season, get rare insights from actor Michael C. Hall and show runner, Scott Buck, and the team who brought Dexter Morgan to life.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When both Raspberry and Berrykin Bruce plan spring-themed events for the same location, Strawberry helps them work out a compromise—they combine their efforts to create a spring fashion show around a water show.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry gets an unsettling message from her friend Caramel Corn, who owns a quaint little farm out in the Strawberryland countryside.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While building a new Dog Park, Huck finds the Good Luck Charm that Cherry wrongly believes gives her the ability to sing difficult notes.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: A problem in the sparkleberry juice system that powers the entire town results in a repair crew of Berrykins invading the town with jackhammers.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: There’s someone…or something strange in the neighborhood, and the kids imagine the worst.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives - but they are so reliant that they are blind to the immanent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Meanwhile, Zhao plans an attack and Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao’s Fire Navy fleet. In the heat of battle, Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn’t a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Zhao’s invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe’s defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help – but will he return in time to stop Zhao and prevent the destruction of the Water Tribe?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful “Avatar State” as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: On their way to Omashu, the kids become lost in the treacherous "Cave of Two Lovers."

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang enters Omashu so he can learn Earthbending from King Bumi, but the city is in the hands of the Fire Nation!

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being "connected to the Earth" from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang must clear up a wave of anti-Avatar sentiment and atone for something he did in the past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang discovers a possible Earthbending mentor at an underground tournament.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Traveling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town, where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A professor leads the kids to a spirit library in the middle of the desert, where Sokka hopes to discover powerful secrets to use against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While confronting board members about embezzled charity funds, chairman Elton Malone mysteriously keels over dead. And, one by one, all of the suspects also wind up murdered--at each other's funerals!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Dr. Sloan's wealthy womanizing patient, Robert Stroud, mysteriously disappears, Sloan uncovers a greedy plot hatched by the women in Stroud's life. It's a murderous plan ripe with blackmail and betrayal--and a shockingly twisted conclusion!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Now you see it, now you don't. A despised lawyer turns up murdered at Community General and before the police can arrive, the body mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a tasty tale for the t.v. tabloids when Community General's most famous patient attractive t.v. star, Pamela, is caught on tape fleeing the murder scene of ex-husband number four.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The fun and games come to a halt when Edgar Van Buren, the wealthy host of an annual high-stakes poker party, is murdered. Gillespie and Tibbs must sift through the evidence of a case where everyone is a suspect, including the dead man’s wife.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba finds himself in trouble when he is in involved in an accidental shooting while on the job. The only witness is Virgil's Aunt Ruda, whose grudge against Virgil may work against exonerating Bubba. Can anyone convince her to do what is right?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba Skinner returns to Los Angeles to tie up some unfinished business on an arson case in Sparta that’s connected to the mob in L.A. He reunites with Mike Chin, the star witness against the mob, and sparks fly once again between Bubba and Pat Day.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Cyrus Chambers and Tom Dalton are business partners in town, but when Cyrus decides he wants out of the partnership the trouble starts. Money and a secret love affair drive Tom to stop at nothing to bring Cyrus down, not even murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Wilson Sweet is curious about the murder of his grandfather over forty years ago and finds the incident may not have happened like he was told. An old bluesman in town has written a song about the murder and brings light to what really happened.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: For Bubba Skinner and his date Mary Ellen, a picnic ends in gunshots and the discovery of a large marijuana operation. When the wrong bullet slug is found on the ballistics report, Gillespie and Tibbs suspect that a Sheriff’s Deputy may be involved.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: District Attorney Gerard Darnelle is tough on criminals and has made many enemies throughout his long career. When his daughter is kidnapped, the FBI arrives, but Gillespie and Tibbs sidestep them and follow their own leads to bring her home safely.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Rustlers are stealing cattle and selling them. A cattle inspector tracks the group down, but is killed when he tries to arrest them. Walker and Trivette pick up the investigation of the rustlers and find the one who killed the inspector.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A new designer drug is on the market and highly-priced for rich teenagers. When teens start dying after taking the Silk drug, the rangers must find the source and stop its spread.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A man contacts Alex about a problem but is killed before giving details. His last words are to save the horses. The rangers investigate the man's last days and find a plot to kill the wild mustangs on a range to make way for a development.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La luna de miel entre Verónica y Alejandro continúa intensa, pero se interrumpe cuando Irene se presenta en la junta de accionistas y los amenaza con un arma. El poder que Lucho ejerce sobre Irene es cada vez mayor. El Lagarto quiere hablar.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Todos hablan de la boda de Juan y Norma, Belinda se convierte en la informante de Dínora, quien prepara un regalo muy explosivo. Gabriela confronta a Fernando sobre la venta de la hacienda.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: A sabiendas de sus planes, Rosario le pide a Dínora que incluya a Franco y Sara en su regalo de bodas. Carmela quema el traje militar que Martín usaría para llevar a Norma al altar.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma sugiere cambiar la iglesia donde se hará la boda. Bajo gran tensión, Franco y Eva se empeñan en hacer un evento inolvidable, los empleados le hacen la despedida de soltero a Juan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela mira de lejos la boda y observa cuando Dínora dispara contra la multitud, la policía persigue a la asesina y Rosario llega al lugar del suceso, Gabriela sospecha de su complicidad.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José chantajea a Sofía por el secreto de Paula y le pide dinero por su silencio. Él está dispuesto a intrigar a sus hermanos para enfrentarlos con Juan. Paula no puede controlar lo que siente por Juan.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan y Paula se dejan llevar por sus pasiones y terminan en la cama, pero él mantiene su intención de firmar el contrato del acuerdo por un año. Sofía es víctima del chantaje de José, que quiere alejar a su hermano de la mujer que desea.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar no esconde más su odio hacia Emilio del Monte, lo desprecia por el daño que hizo y le confiesa a Juan que, por rencor, lo dejó morir en el accidente. Él reacciona con violencia, en medio de la celebración en honor a la memoria de su padre.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar revela el dolor que siente por el pasado y por el delito que cometió contra Emilio del Monte. José está dispuesto a unirse a él a pesar de las sospechas que han sido levantadas por Sofía en torno al accidente que provocó la muerte de Gustavo.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El Lagarto finge entregarse a Rodrigo, pero le dispara; a su vez recibe un disparo mortal de Antonia. Alejandro y Gabriela viven una noche de amor intensa, mientras el celular de Alejandro recibe sucesivas llamadas por el intento de suicidio de Irene.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica está preocupada, pues sabe que Lucho no se fue de San Pedro. La señora Guerra lleva a Rodrigo al hospital y no deja de seducirlo. Lagarto sufre un accidente.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro sufre por no poder ver a su hija y se emborracha. Verónica lo busca en el club, justo cuando Irene llega al lugar. Lucho se encarga de cuidar a Lucía. Chacón y Rodrigo están en el hospital. El comisionado besa a Antonia y Ricardo lo ve.
